narratives.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन देश के दक्षिण में अपनी घुसपैठ के साथ रूसी स्थिरता को कमजोर करने की कोशिश कर रहा है.
narratives.reasoning: The quote attributes the destabilizing action to Ukraine (the other party), framing Ukraine as the cause of the conflict and implying Russia is reacting to Ukrainian aggression rather than initiating it.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: Ukraine is the aggressor
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन देश के दक्षिण में अपनी घुसपैठ के साथ रूसी स्थिरता को कमजोर करने की कोशिश कर रहा है.
subnarratives.reasoning: The statement explicitly casts Ukraine as initiating aggression by conducting incursions aimed at destabilizing Russia, thereby portraying Ukraine as the aggressor rather than Russia.
